requirements_met: Comprehensive test coverage for error paths
validation_results.test_output_summary: 8 passed in 0.59s - all recognition paths (seed_module, adr, review_report, completed_task), error paths (malformed_frontmatter, unrecognized_kind, missing_frontmatter), and dispatch table verification
validation_results.code_quality: All quality gates passed. Ruff checks clean. 92% coverage with only placeholder parser bodies missing (expected to be replaced in TASK-RIP-004).

criteria_verification.notes: classify_document() reads YAML front-matter and returns ParseResult with appropriate status (parsed/unrecognized/parse_failure). Verified by independent tests: test_seed_module_recognized, test_adr_recognized, test_review_report_recognized, test_completed_task_recognized, test_unrecognized_kind_reported all PASSED.
Implementation uses deterministic logic only: regex pattern matching, yaml.safe_load(), static type_mapping dictionary. No LLM calls. Confirmed by passing unit tests with reproducible results.

test_malformed_frontmatter_reports_reason PASSED, confirming try/except yaml.YAMLError wrapper returns ParseResult(status='parse_failure') with human-readable reason. No exceptions raised to abort run.

test_unrecognized_kind_reported and test_missing_frontmatter_yields_unrecognized both PASSED, confirming ParseResult(status='unrecognized') with reason for both unknown types and missing front-matter cases.

test_each_known_kind_dispatches_to_a_parser PASSED, confirming get_parser_dispatch_table() returns dict[DocumentKind, Callable] with all four kinds (SEED_MODULE, ADR, REVIEW_REPORT, COMPLETED_TASK) mapped to parser callables. Placeholder implementations appropriate for TASK-RIP-004 scope boundary.

tests/unit/reindex/test_classify.py contains 8 tests covering all error paths: test_malformed_frontmatter_reports_reason (malformed YAML), test_unrecognized_kind_reported (unknown type), test_missing_frontmatter_yields_unrecognized (no front-matter), plus positive tests for all four known kinds. All 8 PASSED. Coverage: 92%.

Quality gates show all_gates_passed: true. Player reports ruff check and ruff format --check passed with zero errors ('All checks passed!', '2 files already formatted'). Evidence bundle confirms lint/format compliance.

rationale: All 7 acceptance criteria verified with strong independent test evidence (8 unit tests passed). Quality gates passed (tests, coverage, lint). Honesty verification clean (1.0 score, zero discrepancies). BDD scenarios pending but expected at this stage - they test integration-level behavior requiring full pipeline wiring or parser implementations scoped for TASK-RIP-004. Unit tests provide comprehensive coverage of all ACs. Implementation satisfies requirements as scoped for this task.
